MINISTRY . OF SHIPPING, ROAD. TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS (Department of Road Transport and Highways) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th December, 2005 S.O. 1 6D{E).-.tn exercise of the powers conferred by sections 7 and 8A of the National Hig~ways Act. 1956(48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby notifies that there shall l e levied, and paid fees on mechanical vehicles, for the use of the "Four . Ianing and s rengthening of Pune~Nashik Road, National Highway No. 50, in the District Pune, in th State of Maharashtra from Km. 12/190 to Km. 42/000 " (hereinafter referred as ~ reject) at the rates specified in the Schedule hereunder and having regard to the Con~ ssion Agreement dated the 25 1 h August, 2003 entered into with M/s ATR INFRASTRL CTURE PRIVATE LIMITED having its registered office at 501, Dattashram, Hindu Colony, Lane No. 1 Dadar, Mumbai to build, operate and transfer the" Four Ia ing and strengthening of Pune-Nashik Road {N.H. 50) from Km. 12/190 to Km. 42/000 , and for service provided by it and hereby authorizes the said "Mis ATR INFRASTRU~TURE PRIVATE LIMITED" or its auhorized legal representative to collect and retain th~ fees on mechanical vehicles at the rates specified in the said Schedule from the dat of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and until the14th September, ~ 021. SCHEDULE ( Rate~ of Fees to be recovered per trip from the user of the Prolect Facility) Serial Year Toll rates (Rs. Per Vehicle per trimNumber Car/ Jeep/ Van Type of Vehicle L.C.V. [ 'W1 II.:_~ 3(ii)] 5 NOTES:- 1. The tee· set forth shall be charged to the users· of the II Four Ianing and strengthening of Pune-Nashik Road, National Highway No. 50 from Km. 12/190 to Km. 42/000" for a one way trip. · · 2. When a vehicle has to use the II Four Ianing and. strengthening of Pune~Nashik Road, National Highway No. 50 from Km. 12/190 to Km. 42/000 11 more than onee.in a day, the user shall at his option be entitled to do so on payment of one and half times the . fee at the rates as given in the Schedule for one way trip in the first trip itself. A vehicle owner shall also be entitled to a monthly pass on payment of fee equal to thirty times the fee for one-way trip. The trip shall mean unidirectional journey between Km. 12/190 and 42100 of Project length either for full or part length crossing either one or both toll stations. 3. The following types of vehicles are exempted from the fee specified above in the Schedule, namely:- (i) (ii) (iii) (iv) (v) (vi) (vii)· (viii) Defence vehicles; Vehicles with VIP symbols; Police vehicles; Fire-fighting vehicles; Ambulances; Funeral vans; Posts and Telegraph Department vehicles of the Department of Post and Telegraph; Central Government and State Government vehicles on duty; 4. The vehicles officially belonging to the following shall be deemed to be ve~icles having VIP symbols, narriely:- .... ' (i) (ii) (iii) (iv) (v) (vi) (vii) (viii) (ix) {X) (xi) (xii) President of India; Vice-President of India; Central and State Ministers; . Leaders of Opposition in Lok Sabha/Rajya Sabha/State Legislature having the status of Cabinet Ministers; Governors of States"; Lieutenant Governors of Union Territories; Speakers or Chairman of Central and State Legislatures; Foreign dignitaries on State visit to India; Foreign Diplomats stationed in India using cars with CD(Car Diplomatic) symbols; . Members of Parliament of the entire country on production of ID Card issued by the Parliament; · . Members of Legislative Assemblies/Legislative Councils within the State on production of ID Card issued by the State Legislature Assembly and Legislative Council; . Winners of the Gallantry Awards namely, Param Vir Chakra, Ashok Chakra, Maha Vir Chakra, Kirti Chakra, Vir Chakra and Shaurya Chakra on production of ID Card authenticating the Award by the -- 5 of 6 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART ll Sec. :1(ii)l 5. T e above mentioned rates shall be conspicuously displayed at the toll plazas and also t a distance of about 200 metres ahead of the toll plazas on either side of " Four lani g and strengthening of Pune-Nashik Road (N.H. 50) from Kril. 12/190 to Km. 42/000 11 • he height of the display boards and size of letters being such that it is easy for · drivers to ead the display boards and they shall be legibly written or printed in English, Hindi and ther regional language of the area in which the project is situated. 6. T e said 11 M/s ATR INFRASTRUCTURE PRIVATE LIMITED II or its authorized legal repre entatives shall give a receipt to the payer for the fee collected from him . . .. [F. No. RW/NH-6/12037/34/2002-MAH] PRABHAKAR, Dy. Secy. -- 6 of 6 --
